parameters.name: RepoFilter
parameters.label: Repository
parameters.query:
let repos = AppEvents
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where Name in ("scan_completed", "report_created", "shared_report_viewed", "scan_succeeded_client", "report_shared_client", "shared_report_loaded_client")
| extend repo_name = tostring(Properties.repo_name)
| where isnotempty(repo_name)
| summarize by value = repo_name, label = repo_name
| order by label asc
| extend selected = false;
datatable(value:string, label:string, selected:bool)["*", "All repos", true]
| union repos

content.json:
# Is AI Native Growth and Engagement

Campaign-focused Azure Workbook for the web app's Application Insights telemetry. It combines browser traffic from `AppPageViews` with custom engagement and conversion events from `AppEvents`.

Current window: **{TimeRange:label}**  
Repository drill-in: **{RepoFilter}**

This project does not emit generic clickstream telemetry yet. In this dashboard, **CTA clicks** are the tracked intent events you already send today, mainly scan requests and report-share requests. Repository filtering applies only to repo-attributed events, not anonymous page traffic.

content.title: Unique visitors
Sessions
Page views

content.query:
AppEvents
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where Name in ("cta_clicked_client", "scan_requested_client", "report_share_requested_client")
| summarize cta_clicks = sum(ItemCount)
content.title: CTA clicks

content.query:
let repoFilter = "{RepoFilter}";
AppEvents
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where Name == "report_created"
| extend repo_name = tostring(Properties.repo_name)
| where repoFilter == "*" or repo_name == repoFilter
| summarize reports_created = sum(ItemCount)
content.title: Reports created

content.query:
let repoFilter = "{RepoFilter}";
AppEvents
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where Name == "shared_report_viewed"
| extend repo_name = tostring(Properties.repo_name)
| where repoFilter == "*" or repo_name == repoFilter
| summarize shared_report_views = sum(ItemCount)
content.title: Shared report views
Session to scan rate %
Share completion %

content.query:
AppPageViews
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| summarize Visitors = dcount(UserId), Sessions = dcount(SessionId), PageViews = sum(ItemCount) by bin(TimeGenerated, {TimeRange:grain})
| order by TimeGenerated asc
content.title: Visitors, sessions, and page views over time

content.query:
AppPageViews
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| extend route = coalesce(tostring(Properties.route), tostring(Properties.path), extract(@"https?://[^/]+(/[^?#]*)", 1, Url), "/")
| summarize PageViews = sum(ItemCount) by Route = route
| top 8 by PageViews desc
| order by PageViews desc
content.title: Top routes by page views

content.query:
AppPageViews
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| extend route = coalesce(tostring(Properties.route), tostring(Properties.path), extract(@"https?://[^/]+(/[^?#]*)", 1, Url), "/")
| extend Journey = case(route startswith "/_/report/", "Shared report", route == "/" or isempty(route), "Homepage", "Other")
| summarize PageViews = sum(ItemCount) by Journey
| order by PageViews desc
content.title: Traffic mix by journey

content.query:
let repoFilter = "{RepoFilter}";
AppEvents
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where Name in ("scan_requested_client", "scan_succeeded_client", "report_created", "report_share_requested_client", "report_shared_client", "shared_report_viewed")
| extend repo_name = tostring(Properties.repo_name)
| where repoFilter == "*" or isempty(repo_name) or repo_name == repoFilter
| summarize ScanRequests = sumif(ItemCount, Name == "scan_requested_client"), ScanSucceeded = sumif(ItemCount, Name == "scan_succeeded_client"), ReportsCreated = sumif(ItemCount, Name == "report_created"), ShareRequested = sumif(ItemCount, Name == "report_share_requested_client"), ShareCompleted = sumif(ItemCount, Name == "report_shared_client"), SharedReportViews = sumif(ItemCount, Name == "shared_report_viewed") by bin(TimeGenerated, {TimeRange:grain})
| order by TimeGenerated asc
content.title: High-intent actions over time

content.query:
let repoFilter = "{RepoFilter}";
AppEvents
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where Name in ("scan_requested_client", "scan_succeeded_client", "scan_failed_client", "report_share_requested_client", "report_shared_client", "report_share_failed_client", "shared_report_loaded_client", "shared_report_load_failed_client", "report_created", "shared_report_viewed")
| extend repo_name = tostring(Properties.repo_name)
| where repoFilter == "*" or isempty(repo_name) or repo_name == repoFilter
| summarize Events = sum(ItemCount) by Action = replace_string(Name, "_client", "")
| order by Events desc
content.title: Tracked action mix

content.query:
AppEvents
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where Name == "cta_clicked_client"
| extend source = tostring(Properties.source)
| where isnotempty(source)
| summarize Clicks = sum(ItemCount) by CTA = source
| order by Clicks desc
content.title: CTA sources

content.query:
AppEvents
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where Name == "landing_section_viewed_client"
| summarize Views = sum(ItemCount) by Section = tostring(Properties.section)
| order by Views desc
content.title: Landing section engagement

content.query:
AppEvents
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where Name == "outbound_doc_link_clicked_client"
| summarize Clicks = sum(ItemCount) by Destination = tostring(Properties.destination_host)
| order by Clicks desc
content.title: Outbound documentation clicks
Acquisition to sharing funnel

content.query:
let repoFilter = "{RepoFilter}";
AppEvents
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where Name in ("scan_completed", "report_created", "shared_report_viewed")
| extend repo_name = tostring(Properties.repo_name)
| where isnotempty(repo_name)
| where repoFilter == "*" or repo_name == repoFilter
| summarize CompletedScans = sumif(ItemCount, Name == "scan_completed"), ReportsCreated = sumif(ItemCount, Name == "report_created"), SharedReportViews = sumif(ItemCount, Name == "shared_report_viewed") by Repository = repo_name
| order by CompletedScans desc
content.title: Repository conversion detail

content.query:
AppPageViews
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| summarize PageViews = sum(ItemCount) by Country = iff(isempty(ClientCountryOrRegion), "Unknown", ClientCountryOrRegion)
| top 10 by PageViews desc
| order by PageViews desc
content.title: Top countries by page views

content.query:
AppPageViews
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| summarize PageViews = sum(ItemCount) by Browser = iff(isempty(ClientBrowser), "Unknown", ClientBrowser)
| top 8 by PageViews desc
| order by PageViews desc
content.title: Browser mix

content.query:
let repoFilter = "{RepoFilter}";
AppEvents
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where Name in ("cta_clicked_client", "outbound_doc_link_clicked_client", "landing_section_viewed_client", "scan_requested_client", "scan_succeeded_client", "scan_failed_client", "report_share_requested_client", "report_shared_client", "report_share_failed_client", "shared_report_loaded_client", "shared_report_load_failed_client", "scan_completed", "scan_failed", "report_created", "shared_report_viewed")
| extend repo_name = tostring(Properties.repo_name), report_id = tostring(Properties.report_id), verdict = tostring(Properties.verdict), method = tostring(Properties.method), reason = tostring(Properties.reason), score = todouble(Measurements.score), source = tostring(Properties.source), section = tostring(Properties.section), destination_host = tostring(Properties.destination_host)
| where repoFilter == "*" or isempty(repo_name) or repo_name == repoFilter
| project TimeGenerated, event = Name, surface = AppRoleName, source, section, destination_host, repo_name, report_id, method, verdict, score, reason, browser = ClientBrowser, country = ClientCountryOrRegion, session_id = SessionId, user_id = UserId
| order by TimeGenerated desc
content.title: Recent engagement and conversion events
